name: Menubar

records.name: MenubarContext
records.signature:
MenubarContext(
        string? OpenMenuId,
        EventCallback<string?> SetOpenMenuId,
        bool AnyOpen,
        List<string> MenuIds,
        Action<string> RegisterMenuId,
        Action<int> NavigateMenus)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Menubar>
    <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>File</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
            <MenubarItem>
                New Tab <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+T</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>
                New Window <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+N</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarSeparator />
            <MenubarItem>
                Share <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+S</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarSeparator />
            <MenubarItem>
                Print <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+P</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
    <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>Edit</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
            <MenubarItem>
                Undo <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+Z</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>
                Redo <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+Y</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarSeparator />
            <MenubarItem>
                Cut <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+X</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>
                Copy <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+C</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>
                Paste <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+V</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
    <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>View</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
            <MenubarItem>
                Zoom In <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl++</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>
                Zoom Out <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+-</MenubarShortcut>
            </MenubarItem>
            <MenubarSeparator />
            <MenubarItem>Toggle Fullscreen</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
</Menubar>

examples.title: Text Editor
examples.code:
<Menubar>
    <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>Format</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
            <MenubarLabel>Text</MenubarLabel>
            <MenubarItem>Bold <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+B</MenubarShortcut></MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Italic <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+I</MenubarShortcut></MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Underline <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+U</MenubarShortcut></MenubarItem>
            <MenubarSeparator />
            <MenubarLabel>Alignment</MenubarLabel>
            <MenubarItem>Align Left</MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Align Center</MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Align Right</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
    <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>Insert</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
            <MenubarItem>Image</MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Table</MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Link</MenubarItem>
            <MenubarSeparator />
            <MenubarItem Disabled="true">Video (Pro)</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
    <MenubarMenu>
        <MenubarTrigger>Tools</MenubarTrigger>
        <MenubarContent>
            <MenubarItem>Word Count <MenubarShortcut>Ctrl+W</MenubarShortcut></MenubarItem>
            <MenubarItem>Spell Check</MenubarItem>
        </MenubarContent>
    </MenubarMenu>
</Menubar>

MenubarSubContext(

        EventCallback<bool> SetOpen,
        string WrapperId,
        string TriggerId,
        string ContentId,
        EventCallback CloseTree,
        Action ScheduleClose,
        Action CancelClose)

mdSummary:
# Menubar

Horizontal menubar with File/Edit-style dropdowns.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/menubar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Menubar | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Menubar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Menubar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarContent | Context | `Menubar.MenubarContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarContent | MenuContext | `MenubarMenu.MenubarMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarItem | Context | `Menubar.MenubarContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| MenubarItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| MenubarItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarLabel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarMenu | Context | `Menubar.MenubarContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarMenu | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarShortcut | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarShortcut | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarShortcut | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSub | RootContext | `Menubar.MenubarContext?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSub | ParentSubContext | `MenubarSubContext?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSub | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSub | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSubContent | SubContext | `MenubarSub.MenubarSubContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarSubContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSubContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSubContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| MenubarSubTrigger | SubContext | `MenubarSub.MenubarSubContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarSubTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |

| MenubarTrigger | Context | `Menubar.MenubarContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarTrigger | MenuContext | `MenubarMenu.MenubarMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| MenubarTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| MenubarTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| MenubarTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Menubar) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarLabel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarMenu) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarShortcut) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarSub) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarSubContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarSubTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (MenubarTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `MenubarContent`, `MenubarItem`, `MenubarLabel`, `MenubarMenu`, `MenubarSeparator`, `MenubarShortcut`, `MenubarSub`, `MenubarSubContent`, `MenubarSubTrigger`, `MenubarTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Menubar.MenubarContext`)
- `MenuContext` (`MenubarMenu.MenubarMenuContext`)
- `RootContext` (`Menubar.MenubarContext?`)
- `ParentSubContext` (`MenubarSubContext?`)
- `SubContext` (`MenubarSub.MenubarSubContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in MenubarContent.razor

## Example
```razor
<Menubar />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--radius`
